news.title: Minda Corporation forms Spark Minda Turntide JV, per announcement.
news.summary: Minda Corporation forms Spark Minda Turntide JV, per announcement.

news.title:
Minda Corporation forms JV with Turntide UK; SMGM holds 49%, Turntide 51%.
JV aims at advanced motor controllers and EV powertrain products for India.
news.summary:
Minda Corporation forms JV with Turntide UK; SMGM holds 49%, Turntide 51%.
JV aims at advanced motor controllers and EV powertrain products for India.

news.title:
Minda Corporation received an Assessment Order under Section 143(3) of the Income Tax Act for AY 2023-24.
The order demands ₹67.1 Cr, including ₹17.8 Cr interest; the company plans to contest it.
news.summary:
Minda Corporation received an Assessment Order under Section 143(3) of the Income Tax Act for AY 2023-24.
The order demands ₹67.1 Cr, including ₹17.8 Cr interest; the company plans to contest it.

news.title:
Minda Corporation confirms redemption payment of INR 100 crore commercial papers.
The payment includes both interest and principal amounts as informed to the exchange.
news.summary:
Minda Corporation confirms redemption payment of INR 100 crore commercial papers.
The payment includes both interest and principal amounts as informed to the exchange.

news.title:
Minda Corporation revised CP maturity date to 18.03.2026 due to Gudhi Padwa holiday.
Record date updated to 17.03.2026 for CP redemption in compliance with FIMMDA guidelines.
news.summary:
Minda Corporation revised CP maturity date to 18.03.2026 due to Gudhi Padwa holiday.
Record date updated to 17.03.2026 for CP redemption in compliance with FIMMDA guidelines.

news.title:
Minda Corp aims ₹75–100 crore revenue from Turntide EV tie-up by FY28.
JV to develop EV powertrain solutions by Q4 FY27, focusing on 2W, 3W & CV.
news.summary:
Minda Corp aims ₹75–100 crore revenue from Turntide EV tie-up by FY28.
JV to develop EV powertrain solutions by Q4 FY27, focusing on 2W, 3W & CV.

news.title: MindaCorp shares rose 4% after a JV with Turntide Drives for EV components.
news.summary: MindaCorp shares rose 4% after a JV with Turntide Drives for EV components.

news.title:
Minda Corporation partners to develop motor controllers & EV solutions in India.
The collaboration targets growth in the expanding Indian EV market.
news.summary:
Minda Corporation partners to develop motor controllers & EV solutions in India.
The collaboration targets growth in the expanding Indian EV market.

news.title:
Minda Corporation's Spark Minda Green Mobility forms JV with UK's Turntide Drives.
JV aims to create advanced EV powertrain solutions; SMGM holds 49%, Turntide 51%.
news.summary:
Minda Corporation's Spark Minda Green Mobility forms JV with UK's Turntide Drives.
JV aims to create advanced EV powertrain solutions; SMGM holds 49%, Turntide 51%.

news.title: Minda Corporation Ltd announces redemption of Commercial Paper.
news.summary: Minda Corporation Ltd announces redemption of Commercial Paper.

news.title:
Minda Corporation's ₹100 crore commercial paper maturity shifted to 2 Mar 2026 due to Holi.
Revised payment processing aligns with guidelines; investors must note the new deadline.
news.summary:
Minda Corporation's ₹100 crore commercial paper maturity shifted to 2 Mar 2026 due to Holi.
Revised payment processing aligns with guidelines; investors must note the new deadline.

news.title:
MoUs worth ₹11,000 cr signed with Japanese firms during UP CM Yogi Adityanath's Japan visit.
Key firms include Kubota, Minda Corp, Japan Aviation Electronics, Nagase, Seiko Advance, and Fuji JV.
news.summary:
MoUs worth ₹11,000 cr signed with Japanese firms during UP CM Yogi Adityanath's Japan visit.
Key firms include Kubota, Minda Corp, Japan Aviation Electronics, Nagase, Seiko Advance, and Fuji JV.

news.title:
Minda Corporation sets record dates for redemption of three commercial papers worth ₹100 crore each, maturing in March 2026.
Redemption dates are March 3, 6, and 19, 2026, with record dates a day prior to each maturity.
news.summary:
Minda Corporation sets record dates for redemption of three commercial papers worth ₹100 crore each, maturing in March 2026.
Redemption dates are March 3, 6, and 19, 2026, with record dates a day prior to each maturity.

news.title:
Meta partners with Nvidia to expand AI infrastructure, committing billions to AI hardware for apps like WhatsApp.
Meta allocates $65M for AI regulation lobbying, aiming for influence on state-level AI rules and privacy practices.
news.summary:
Meta partners with Nvidia to expand AI infrastructure, committing billions to AI hardware for apps like WhatsApp.
Meta allocates $65M for AI regulation lobbying, aiming for influence on state-level AI rules and privacy practices.

news.title:
Minda Corp targets ₹17,500 cr revenue by 2030 with 22% CAGR, including ₹4,000-₹4,500 cr from acquisitions.
Exports, new product lines, and acquisitions like Flash Electronics to drive growth; exports to reach 12-13% of revenue.
news.summary:
Minda Corp targets ₹17,500 cr revenue by 2030 with 22% CAGR, including ₹4,000-₹4,500 cr from acquisitions.
Exports, new product lines, and acquisitions like Flash Electronics to drive growth; exports to reach 12-13% of revenue.

news.title: Minda Corporation sees significant demand surge post-GST cut.
news.summary: Minda Corporation sees significant demand surge post-GST cut.

news.title:
Minda Corporation raised INR 420.8 crore via preferential share warrants in June 2025.
Q3 FY25-26 saw INR 105.2 crore used for debt repayment; no deviations reported.
news.summary:
Minda Corporation raised INR 420.8 crore via preferential share warrants in June 2025.
Q3 FY25-26 saw INR 105.2 crore used for debt repayment; no deviations reported.

news.title: Minda Corp reports Q3 revenue of 15B Rupees, up from 12.5B YoY.
news.summary: Minda Corp reports Q3 revenue of 15B Rupees, up from 12.5B YoY.

news.title:
Minda Corporation's board approved unaudited financial results for Q3 and nine months ended Dec 31, 2025.
Interim dividend of Rs. 0.60/share declared; record date set for Feb 13, 2026; CFO Ajay Agarwal appointed as GCRO.
news.summary:
Minda Corporation's board approved unaudited financial results for Q3 and nine months ended Dec 31, 2025.
Interim dividend of Rs. 0.60/share declared; record date set for Feb 13, 2026; CFO Ajay Agarwal appointed as GCRO.

news.title:
Minda Corporation to hold a conference call on 5 Feb 2026 at 4 PM IST.
The call will discuss Q3 and 9-month FY26 results with senior officials.
news.summary:
Minda Corporation to hold a conference call on 5 Feb 2026 at 4 PM IST.
The call will discuss Q3 and 9-month FY26 results with senior officials.
